title: Pokkiri
subTitle: Thamizh, an undercover officer posing as a hitman, falls for Shruthi, who disapproves of his violent lifestyle. Their growing bond faces risks from his hidden mission.

title: U-Turn
subTitle: Rachana, an intern at a newspaper, investigates accidents occurring on a flyover with the help of a crime reporter. However, the situation changes when she is accused of murder.

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: Thalaivaa
subTitle: Vishwa runs a small business in Sydney, unaware that his father is a gangster in Mumbai. When his father is killed by a rival, Vishwa takes over his crime syndicate with revenge on his mind.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Ee Pattanathil Bhootham
subTitle: An evil magician releases a friendly spirit and orders him to make money through crime. However, the spirit falls into the hands of circus children after the sorcerer loses him in an accident.

title: Dora
subTitle: A father and daughter purchase an old run-down vintage car. However, unbeknownst to them, the car is possessed by a dangerous revenge-seeking spirit.

title: Yashoda
subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: Kairali TV
subTitle: Gao Feng, a former bodyguard scarred by the death of his wife, returns to his old job. However, he soon finds himself entangled in a series of life-threatening missions.

title: Nadodikkattu
subTitle: After losing their jobs, Dasan and Vijayan decide to go to Dubai to try their luck. But they end up in a different location, where they are mistaken for crime investigation officers.

title: Bharathchandran I.P.S.
subTitle: Hyder Ali Hassan, a scheming politician, is in league with the underworld and runs a lot of illegal businesses. Balachandran, an IPS officer, is sent on a mission to capture him.

title: Chess
subTitle: A man murders his rich brother-in-law with the help of three co-conspirators to amass his wealth. He also manages to discredit the deceased man's illegitimate son.

title: Pon Manickavel
subTitle: Pon Manickavel, IPS officer, is given the task to solve the case of a judge's murder. While his team attempts to crack the crime, the life of high profile persons are threatened.

title: Siruthai
subTitle: Rocket Raja, a small-time thief, comes across a young girl who calls him father. However, when Raja finds the truth about the girl's past, he turns into a vigilante.

title: The Rise of Hero
subTitle: Huang Fei Hong's dream of studying abroad is threatened when he discovers that conservative court officials are working to undermine and cancel the government's Studying Abroad Campaign.

title: Viswasam
subTitle: Thooku Durai, a strong and respected village leader, faces personal struggles as he tries to reunite with his estranged wife Niranjana and daughter, all while confronting challenges from his past.

title: Disco Raja
subTitle: A ground-breaking scientific experiment brings a deceased man to life. However, things take a turn when he tries to escape the facility after waking up with no past memories.

title: The Warriorr
subTitle: Satya, a doctor, is brutally beaten and driven out of his city by Guru, a ruthless gangster. However, Satya returns two years later as a police officer to exact revenge on Guru.

title: Thalainagaram 2
subTitle: Right, a former gangster, swears off violence to become a real estate agent. However, he is forced to return to his old ways when three criminals try to frame him for a crime.

title: PK
subTitle: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. However, he meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device with her help.

title: East Dragon
subTitle: At times of chaos and revolution, authorities try to get the ancient prophecy but fail. Soon, a general requests Janghyo to find the ancient grave in exchange for releasing his friend.

title: Gajaana
subTitle: On an adventurous search for treasure in the dense forest, a group of young explorers soon discovers they have become the quarry.

title: Comali
subTitle: A long coma leaves Ravi disorientated in an unrecognisable world. However, he sets out on a journey to reclaim his past and adapt to a new reality.
